text:
/ci2 2 光＆闇の希望の戦士、参上っ！！
大変だ！　宇宙の希望が大ピンチ！
さぁ、リーダーの出番だよっ！！

/ci2 1 やったねリーダー、希望は守られたよ！
だが、希望の戦士たちの戦いは続く……
宇宙に助けを求めるヒトがいる限りっ！

これは戦略的撤退！
希望の戦士たちは諦めないっ！！
人々が希望を諦めない限り……！

ボクがいなくなっても……
希望は、リーダーが守ってくれるさ……

闇があるから、光は輝きを増す……
キミの想いを胸に
ボクは輝いてみせるっ！！

/ci2 2 Warriors of hope, light and dark, go forth!
Things aren't looking good for the universe!
Time for our leader to take a stand!

/ci2 1 Well done, Leader, you've protected us all!
But the battle goes on for us warriors of hope...
As long as there are still people to protect!

This is a strategic retreat!
But we warriors of hope will never surrender!
Not if hope still burns in the people's hearts!

Even if I should fall...
Hope still lives on in our leader...

Light will always shine through the darkness...
Just as your memory will shine on within our
hearts!
